data.body:
[Joint Firing Drill Preview]

11/29 (Tue) Joint Firing Drill - 'Breakthrough Drill' will start soon!

Practice battling enemies while healing a practice dummy. See which students have healing skills, and start honing those skills!

http://discord.com/invite/bluearchiveglobal
